creator: almarrie@gmail.com
text:
Hey Philip,

Since I run threaded app I really need this port, and I thank you for
your great efforts to make it  hit ports before another ports freeze
placed for FreeBSD 7.0 :)


Could you please add the -N flag per Pav note?

-- 
Regards,

-Abdullah Ibn Hamad Al-Marri
Arab Portal
http://www.WeArab.Net/
